pleiodbr 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference

Package index

Open a database

open_pleiodb()
Open a pleiodb database

Queries

All return a tibble with columns: variant_id, trait_id, z, beta, se, pval, eaf, n, imputed.

phewas()
PheWAS query
gwas()
GWAS query
tophits()
Top hits query
associations()
Associations block query

Phenotypic correlation

rho()
Rho (phenotypic correlation) query

On this page
